query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_sessions) as total_sessions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transactions) as total_transactions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active') as active_subscriptions,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(totalSpent),0) FROM credit_wallets) as total_credits_spent,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance),0) FROM credit_wallets) as total_credits_balance;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3RYRgiKBksaJ9ku.eff254cfce12 --database 6PpfERRQXfuwb7GGi2gFrK --execute

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_sessions) as total_sessions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM credit_transactions) as total_transactions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active') as active_subscriptions,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(totalSpent),0) FROM credit_wallets) as total_credits_spent,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance),0) FROM credit_wallets) as total_credits_balance;
